title: Sample General Knowledge Test
description: Replace this file with your own mcq-data.json. Keep max 50 questions.

questions.question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.explanation: Mars appears red because of iron oxide (rust) on its surface.

questions.question: What is the largest ocean on Earth?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's oceanic divisions.

questions.question: Who wrote the play 'Romeo and Juliet'?
questions.explanation: 'Romeo and Juliet' is a tragedy written by William Shakespeare early in his career.

questions.question: What is the chemical symbol for gold?
questions.explanation: The chemical symbol for gold comes from the Latin name 'Aurum'.

questions.question: Which country hosted the 2016 Summer Olympics?
questions.explanation: The 2016 Summer Olympics were held in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
